text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Aoi Stakes, and I'm worried
about how busy Curren Chan has been posting on
all of her social media. What if it affects her
performance today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Curren Chan cutely declares that her
performance will take all of my worries away.
